name: MSI PRO B760-VC WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-6800+(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 5 802.11ac - BT 5.1 (B760PROVCWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO B760-VC WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports
description: ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR5 support, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 5 for mid-range builds.
